title: Irvington, KY
description: <CENTRE> <SIZE:medium> IRVINGTON <LINE> <LINE><LEFT> <SIZE:small>  Despite its humble appearance, Irvington is a global byword for SPEED! <LINE> <LINE> The Irvington Speedway's OSCC events draw fans from all around the world, and there's even talk of it hosting a Formula X race soon. <LINE> <LINE> Outside of race days, you can find locals gathering to play games in the Wizard's Keep, purchasing guns at Well Regulated Militia, or perusing the latest bovine stock at Brott Cattle Farm.
